headline: Neural Network Basics
description: Neural networks are computing systems inspired by biological neurons: layers of interconnected nodes that transform input data through weighted connections and activation functions. A simple feedforward network: Input Layer → Hidden Layer(s) → Output Layer. Each neuron computes weighted sum + bias + activation function.
